code:
async def batch_process(items: list[dict], max_concurrent: int = 5) -> list[dict]:
    semaphore = asyncio.Semaphore(max_concurrent)
    async def process_one(item: dict) -> dict:
        async with semaphore:
            result = await transform(item)
            return {**item, 'result': result}
    return await asyncio.gather(*[process_one(i) for i in items])
criteria: Complex but correct async code with proper semaphore usage
eval() with user input is a critical security vulnerability
Well-typed dataclass with proper annotations should be approved
Using random instead of secrets for security token generation
